# Documentation Update - issue-24

Documentation updates were required because issue #24 changes workflow startup behavior and release versions.

## Updated

- `README.md`: updated current Claude/Codex plugin versions to `3.1.7` and `1.1.7`.
- `CHANGELOG.md`: added the 2026-05-15 `3.1.7` / Codex `1.1.7` entry covering mandatory startup transaction, skipped-bootstrap hardening, issue-to-roadmap sync, and test coverage.
- `commands/workflow-next.md`: documented the mandatory startup transaction and hard stop when startup tooling is unavailable.
- Phase command docs and Codex skill docs: added startup receipt guard language for issue-backed work.

## Result

UPDATED
